title: NBTApi
description: Mod for reading/editing NBT data in level.dat directly in the game.
body:
### NBTApi
Just a mod for reading and writing NBT data in level.dat with open source code.

It is not useful on its own and is only needed for use in other mods.

The mod automatically scans your worlds to find level.dat, so by downloading this mod, you agree that it will do this with your worlds.
